'''ravada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kabok|kabok]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-v-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kabok|kabok]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ravada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rævædæth|rævædæth]] || [[word:rævædæj|rævædæj]] || [[word:rævædæsh|rævædæsh]] || [[word:rævædæ|rævædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ravavadath|ravavadath]] || [[word:ravavadaj|ravavadaj]] || [[word:ravavadash|ravavadash]] || [[word:ravavada|ravavada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ravadath|ravadath]] || [[word:ravadaj|ravadaj]] || [[word:ravadash|ravadash]] || [[word:ravada|ravada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ravafdath|ravafdath]] || [[word:ravafdaj|ravafdaj]] || [[word:ravafdash|ravafdash]] || [[word:ravafdaf|ravafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ravadatha|ravadatha]] || [[word:ravadaja|ravadaja]] || [[word:ravadasha|ravadasha]] || [[word:ravadaka|ravadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ravadath|ravadath]] || [[word:ravadaj|ravadaj]] || [[word:ravadash|ravadash]] || [[word:ravada|ravada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ravadathal|ravadathal]] || [[word:ravadajal|ravadajal]] || [[word:ravadashal|ravadashal]] || [[word:ravadakal|ravadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ravadathatha|ravadathatha]] || [[word:ravadajaja|ravadajaja]] || [[word:ravadashasha|ravadashasha]] || [[word:ravadaka|ravadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ravadathan|ravadathan]] || [[word:ravadajan|ravadajan]] || [[word:ravadashan|ravadashan]] || [[word:ravadakan|ravadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ravadathaoro|ravadathaoro]] || [[word:ravadajaoro|ravadajaoro]] || [[word:ravadashaoro|ravadashaoro]] || [[word:ravadakaoro|ravadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
